subject: WM-0127 review: verified
body: No blocking findings; confirmed WM-0111..WM-0126 and WM-0128 are done/verified/integrated, WM-0128 clears the WM-0126 benchmark stop sign under unchanged 10/20 policy, platform and owner gates remain preserved, future handoff is non-executable with no post-M8 tasks, and required closeout check evidence is present.
